narrative:
Precinct Miami / Quincy (precinct in Logan County) has 737 registered voters, with 53.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 5.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 35.5 percentage points.
